author: Nico de Wet
content: I can imagine a number of versions of the ClientStubPostProcessor that should ideally be contained in a company util library (if one is so lucky as to be in a dev shop that goes this far). In my case my technical debt ladden first stab entailed simply replacing the BeanDefinition BeanClassName with the stub – but this won’t cut it, the stub belongs in src/test/java. Thanks for the tutorial, a useful reference.

author: Ramu
content:
